examples.title: Interrupt Service Routine
examples.description: Basic structure of an ISR handling keyboard input
examples.code:
ISR_KEYBOARD:
    SAVE_REGISTERS
    READ keycode FROM keyboard_buffer
    STORE keycode IN memory_buffer
    SEND EOI TO interrupt_controller
    RESTORE_REGISTERS
    RETURN_FROM_INTERRUPT
examples.explanation: Shows register preservation, data handling, and interrupt acknowledgment

examples.title: DMA Initialization
examples.explanation: Configures source/destination addresses and starts transfer
